qry:select.name: qry_ultimo_nivel
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT DCO.c_ultimo_nivel FROM PRE06_EST_REPORTE AS EST, PRE06_NODOS as NOD1, PRE06_NODOS as NOD2, PRE06_NODOS as NOD3, PRE05_LEGAJOS AS LEG, PRE08_GRUPOS AS GRU, PRE05_DET_CONCEPTOS AS DCO, PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER, PRE16_TIPO_CONC AS TIP, PRE07_CONCEPTOS AS CON JOIN EST.oi_nodo INNER NOD1.oi_nodo, NOD1.oi_nodo INNER NOD2.oi_nodo_padre, NOD2.oi_nodo INNER NOD3.oi_nodo_padre, NOD3.c_valor_iden INNER DCO.c_ultimo_nivel, LEG.oi_grupo INNER GRU.oi_grupo, LEG.oi_legajo INNER DCO.oi_legajo, DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal, DET.oi_detalle_pres INNER DCO.oi_detalle_pres, DCO.oi_concepto INNER CON.oi_concepto, CON.oi_tipo_concepto INNER TIP.oi_tipo_concepto WHERE EST.oi_est_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_est_reporte} and LEG.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} AND TIP.l_novedades = 0 AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1 GROUP BY DCO.c_ultimo_nivel
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DEFqry_Reporte
DEFqry_ColsDetalles
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT DET.oi_detalle_pres, PER.c_corta, PER.e_orden FROM PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER JOIN DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal WHERE DET.oi_escenario = {#PARAMIN:@oi_escenario} AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1 ORDER BY e_orden ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DEFqry_ColsTipos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT TIP.c_nombre_corto, TIP.c_tipo_concepto, TIP.oi_tipo_concepto FROM PRE16_TIPO_CONC AS TIP WHERE TIP.l_novedades = 0 ORDER BY c_tipo_concepto ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT max(NOD1.d_nodo) as d_nodo_1, max(NOD2.d_nodo) as d_nodo_2, max(NOD3.d_nodo) as d_nodo_3, max(LEG.d_legajo) as d_legajo, max(LEG.e_numero_legajo) as e_numero_legajo, max(LEG.f_ingreso) as f_ingreso, max(LEG.f_egreso)as f_egreso, max(GRU.d_grupo) as d_grupo, max(DCO.c_ultimo_nivel) as c_ultimo_nivel, SUM(DCO.n_valor_final) AS Suma, LEG.oi_legajo as oi_legajo FROM PRE06_EST_REPORTE AS EST, PRE06_NODOS as NOD1, PRE06_NODOS as NOD2, PRE06_NODOS as NOD3, PRE05_LEGAJOS AS LEG, PRE08_GRUPOS AS GRU, PRE05_DET_CONCEPTOS AS DCO, PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER, PRE16_TIPO_CONC AS TIP, PRE07_CONCEPTOS AS CON JOIN EST.oi_nodo INNER NOD1.oi_nodo, NOD1.oi_nodo INNER NOD2.oi_nodo_padre, NOD2.oi_nodo INNER NOD3.oi_nodo_padre, NOD3.c_valor_iden INNER DCO.c_ultimo_nivel, LEG.oi_grupo INNER GRU.oi_grupo, LEG.oi_legajo INNER DCO.oi_legajo, DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal, DET.oi_detalle_pres INNER DCO.oi_detalle_pres, DCO.oi_concepto INNER CON.oi_concepto, CON.oi_tipo_concepto INNER TIP.oi_tipo_concepto WHERE EST.oi_est_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_est_reporte} and LEG.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} and DCO.c_ultimo_nivel in (\'{%=#SOURCE:@c_ultimos_niveles%}\') AND TIP.l_novedades = 0 AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1 GROUP BY LEG.oi_legajo order by d_nodo_2 asc, d_nodo_3 asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_conceptos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LEG.oi_legajo as oi_legajo, TIP.oi_tipo_concepto as oi_tipo_concepto, DCO.oi_detalle_pres as oi_detalle_pres, max(DCO.c_ultimo_nivel) as c_ultimo_nivel, SUM(DCO.n_valor_final) AS Suma FROM PRE06_EST_REPORTE AS EST, PRE06_NODOS as NOD1, PRE06_NODOS as NOD2, PRE06_NODOS as NOD3, PRE05_LEGAJOS AS LEG, PRE08_GRUPOS AS GRU, PRE05_DET_CONCEPTOS AS DCO, PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER, PRE16_TIPO_CONC AS TIP, PRE07_CONCEPTOS AS CON JOIN EST.oi_nodo INNER NOD1.oi_nodo, NOD1.oi_nodo INNER NOD2.oi_nodo_padre, NOD2.oi_nodo INNER NOD3.oi_nodo_padre, NOD3.c_valor_iden INNER DCO.c_ultimo_nivel, LEG.oi_grupo INNER GRU.oi_grupo, LEG.oi_legajo INNER DCO.oi_legajo, DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal, DET.oi_detalle_pres INNER DCO.oi_detalle_pres, DCO.oi_concepto INNER CON.oi_concepto, CON.oi_tipo_concepto INNER TIP.oi_tipo_concepto WHERE EST.oi_est_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_est_reporte} and LEG.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} and DCO.c_ultimo_nivel in (\'{%=#SOURCE:@c_ultimos_niveles%}\') AND TIP.l_novedades = 0 AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1 GROUP BY LEG.oi_legajo, TIP.oi_tipo_concepto, DCO.oi_detalle_pres ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_periodos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT DET.oi_detalle_pres, PER.d_periodo_fiscal FROM PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER JOIN DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal WHERE DET.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1
')/ROWS/ROW
